articleTitle: Exploring the therapeutic synergy of drug-lifestyle interventions in fluorosis: a randomized trial on cardiovascular metabolic outcomes from the China fluorosis cohort (CFC).
takeaways: This study only provides an abstract without actual results or findings - no specific interventions, dosages, durations, or quantitative outcomes are reported
The research identifies that skeletal fluorosis patients have elevated cardiovascular risks including endothelial dysfunction and oxidative stress, but no treatment effectiveness data is available
Current treatments are limited to pain management and standard bone medications, but no evidence of superior alternatives is presented in this abstract
The study mentions examining 'drug-lifestyle interventions' but provides no details about what specific lifestyle changes or medications were tested
No measurable health improvements, statistical significance, or clinical recommendations can be extracted from this abstract-only information
